query: SELECT locationId, COUNT(*) as days, MIN(saleDate) as earliest, MAX(saleDate) as latest, ROUND(SUM(CAST(totalSales AS DECIMAL(10,2))),2) as totalRevenue FROM dailySales GROUP BY locationId ORDER BY locationId; SELECT COUNT(*) as totalProducts, COUNT(DISTINCT locationId) as stores FROM productSales WHERE periodStart >= '2026-03-10';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.82b03a6e50f8 --database h46y7gAGiyBszkHNcCdSHx --execute SELECT locationId, COUNT(*) as days, MIN(saleDate) as earliest, MAX(saleDate) as latest, ROUND(SUM(CAST(totalSales AS DECIMAL(10,2))),2) as totalRevenue FROM dailySales GROUP BY locationId ORDER BY locationId; SELECT COUNT(*) as totalProducts, COUNT(DISTINCT locationId) as stores FROM productSales WHERE periodStart >= '2026-03-10';
